action: The triage agent emits triage-report.md but NOT the triage-decision.json companion (confirmed absent in .evolve/runs/cycle-{308,316,320,321,322}/ despite agents/evolve-triage.md:174 instructing it). Consequence: postship promoteInbox's promote-to-processed path (top_n/skip_shipped -> processed/) NEVER runs in production — only the residual-drain (fixed abf9c90f) runs, so claimed inbox items ping-pong back to inbox root every cycle and resolved items never reach processed/ (they rely on Step 0a git-log idempotency to skip-ship). Robust fix: do NOT depend on the LLM writing the JSON. Either (a) the orchestrator DETERMINISTICALLY projects triage-decision.json from the triage-report.md markdown (parse ## top_n / ## deferred / ## dropped + the inbox skip arrays) at the triage deliverable seam — single source, guaranteed present; or (b) a deliverable-contract gate that rejects triage if the .json companion is missing (forces the agent), but (a) is more robust (no LLM dependency). Acceptance: every shipped cycle has triage-decision.json present; promote-to-processed moves genuinely-resolved (skip_shipped) items to processed/; the markdown and json never disagree on top_n.
evidence_pointer: agents/evolve-triage.md:174,208 (instructs the companion); go/internal/phases/ship/postship.go promoteInbox (consumes it); .evolve/runs/cycle-{308,316,320-322}/ (companion absent); go/internal/evalgate/materialization.go (scout's deterministic-materialization precedent)
